title: Theatre Of The Mind
description: Director/Producer/Writer/Performer - Sash SteeleSound Tech - Ollie Yates

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton May 16, 2026 No Comments 2 Mins Read
reviews.rating_raw: The Reviews Hub Star Rating 70 % 70% Though-provoking diasporic storytelling
reviews.excerpt: There’s an intentionally awkward moment towards the end of this one-man storytelling hour, in which the audience is made to hold up some Union Jack bunting. As our performer, playing a migrant from Bangladesh, looks back out at us, there’s a frisson in the room. After all, we all know what this flag represents. Don’t we? Flight: one man’s journey is about memory, home, and belonging, directed by J
